Video.summary: Discover, achieve, level up. Weĺre here to show you that anyone can do extraordinary things.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Blake finds out how important hand strength is when he tries to complete a warrior course.
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Warrior

Image.alt: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Warrior
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Warrior
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Warrior

Video.summary: Blake must put his footwork and finesse to the test on the dance floor when he learns to dance the Salsa.
Video.grandparentTitle: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper?
Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Salsa

Image.alt: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Salsa
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Salsa
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Salsa

Video.summary: Blake needs a bigger, faster partner to tackle todayĺs challenge. Welcome to horse riding.

Video.title: Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Horse Jumping

Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Horse Jumping
Are You Faster Than Blake Leeper? | Horse Jumping

Video.summary: Blake puts his aim to the test when he learns to shoot an arrow from one of the world's best archers.

Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Powerhouse

Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Stunt Spectacular, Vol. 3

Video.summary: Greatness lies in the people who believe in themselves.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Level Up

Video.summary: Whether in the city, the gym or their backyard, an athletes sanctuary is wherever they feel most confident.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Athlete Sanctuary

Video.summary: The name of the game is train, compete, exceed, achieve.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Pure Greatness

Video.summary: There's nothing like getting on stage and performing your heart out.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Going All Out

Video.summary: These folks give it their all in the open air.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Amazing Outdoors

Video.summary: No matter the stage, this cast puts on quite a show.
